body:
# See #3761 for code review and discussions

<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
Updated features and documentation of the non-orographic gravity module. The main features are:

1. Non-orographic gravity-wave tendencies are now diagnostic variables.
2. Non-orographic gravity-wave tendencies are only updated every `dt_nogw` for better computational efficiency, but the tendencies are still added after every dycore timestep.

Closes #3434 

## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->

1. Add docstrings for non-orographic gravity-wave methods
2. Complete going through `gravity_wave.md`


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->
1. ~~Added output diagnostics to the non-orographic config yaml files.~~ (Doesn't seem to be necessary)
3. Extended diagnostics to output (non-orographic) gravity-wave tendencies.
4. Fixed a typo in the example of `diagnostics.md`.
5. Slightly refactored `non_orographic_gravity_wave.jl`.
6. Changed all instances of `NonOrograph**y**GravityWave` type to `NonOrograph**ic**GravityWave`, to be consistent with the `OrographicGravityWave` type.
7. 1. Added `dt_nogw` as a default config. 
    3. The callback method `non_orographic_gravity_wave_compute_tendency!` now computes and updates the non-orographic tendencies every timestep size of `dt_nogw`.
    4. The tendencies are still called and updated every dycore timestep via `remanining_tendency.jl`.
8. Added an elaboration for $\epsilon$ in `gravity_wave.md`.
9. ~~Added `ClimaCoreTempestRemap` to `Project.toml` for orographic gravity wave unit tests.~~ (Not necessary if I use the correct project.)


<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Support for intermittent calls to update non-orographic gravity wave tendencies (Replacement for #3761)
